page_json.description: Vitaherb Dry Malaysia. VitaHerb Cold Cough Syrup provides fast, natural relief from cold and flu symptoms with a blend of herbal extracts and proven ingredients. It helps ease coughs, soothe sore throats, and reduce nasal congestion, while its dual-action formula clears mucus and calms irritation. This non-drowsy formula keeps you feeling clear and focused throughout the day. Safe for adults and children over 12 years old, it provides gentle yet effective relief when you need it most

3406044523.title: [NEW]Nutrimexx Organic Herbal Honey Cough Syrup (250g) - Natural Relief for Coughs, Cold, Flu & Anti-Inflammatory
3406044523.detail_text: 🍯 Nutrimexx Honey: Soothing Triple-Action Relief for Throat, Cough & Chest Soothe, clear, and protect with Nutrimexx Honey — a naturally powerful, triple-action formula designed to care for your entire respiratory system. This German-quality blend combines the best of nature and traditional herbal science , offering comprehensive relief for coughs, sore throats, and congestion while strengthening your body’s natural defenses. 🌿 Three-Way Respiratory Support Unlike ordinary cough syrups or lozenges, Nutrimexx Honey works holistically to restore balance and comfort: 1. Soothes & Calms – Gently eases throat irritation and inflammation caused by persistent coughing, helping you breathe and swallow comfortably again. 2. Clears & Expels – Reduces the urge to cough while supporting the healthy clearance of mucus and phlegm for a cleaner, lighter chest. 3. Protects & Strengthens – Nourishes the throat and lungs, restores internal moisture, and supports your immune system to naturally resist external pathogens. 🔬 The Power of Nature — Proven by Tradition Each ingredient is carefully selected for purity, potency, and its time-tested role in natural respiratory care: 🍯 Organic Multi-Flower Honey – A premium, naturally soothing honey base that coats the throat, calms dryness, and promotes lung comfort. It also provides gentle antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. 🌿 Thyme Oil – Renowned for its natural antibacterial and antiseptic properties, thyme oil helps protect against respiratory pathogens while reducing inflammation in the airways. 🌸 Fennel Oil – Traditionally used to relieve cough and ease breathing. It supports mucus expulsion and helps relax airway muscles for easier airflow. 🍒 Acerola Cherry Juice – A potent natural source of Vitamin C and antioxidants that enhance immune response, promote mucus clearance, and improve resilience during seasonal illnesses. Ingredients: Organic Multi-Flower Honey, Acerola Cherry Juice, Fennel Oil, Thyme Oil. 💡 How to Use Dosage: Take 1 teaspoon (approx. 10–15 ml) mixed in a small cup of warm water . Frequency: Use 3 times daily or as needed for throat and chest comfort. Suitable For: Adults and children from 1 year old. For best results, take regularly at the first sign of throat irritation or cold symptoms. ⚠️ Important Notes Not suitable for children under 1 year , pregnant , or breastfeeding women . Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. This is a natural product — color, taste, and texture may vary slightly. 🌼 Nutrimexx Honey offers a clean, natural path to comfort — no synthetic additives, just pure botanical synergy. Soothe irritation, clear congestion, and strengthen your immunity the gentle way, with every golden spoonful.
3406044523.detail_html:
🍯 Nutrimexx Honey: Soothing Triple-Action Relief for Throat, Cough & Chest

Soothe, clear, and protect with Nutrimexx Honey — a naturally powerful, triple-action formula designed to care for your entire respiratory system. This German-quality blend combines the best of nature and traditional herbal science, offering comprehensive relief for coughs, sore throats, and congestion while strengthening your body’s natural defenses.

🌿 Three-Way Respiratory Support

Unlike ordinary cough syrups or lozenges, Nutrimexx Honey works holistically to restore balance and comfort:

1. Soothes & Calms – Gently eases throat irritation and inflammation caused by persistent coughing, helping you breathe and swallow comfortably again.

2. Clears & Expels – Reduces the urge to cough while supporting the healthy clearance of mucus and phlegm for a cleaner, lighter chest.

3. Protects & Strengthens – Nourishes the throat and lungs, restores internal moisture, and supports your immune system to naturally resist external pathogens.

🔬 The Power of Nature — Proven by Tradition

Each ingredient is carefully selected for purity, potency, and its time-tested role in natural respiratory care:

🍯 Organic Multi-Flower Honey – A premium, naturally soothing honey base that coats the throat, calms dryness, and promotes lung comfort. It also provides gentle antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects.

🌿 Thyme Oil – Renowned for its natural antibacterial and antiseptic properties, thyme oil helps protect against respiratory pathogens while reducing inflammation in the airways.

🌸 Fennel Oil – Traditionally used to relieve cough and ease breathing. It supports mucus expulsion and helps relax airway muscles for easier airflow.

🍒 Acerola Cherry Juice – A potent natural source of Vitamin C and antioxidants that enhance immune response, promote mucus clearance, and improve resilience during seasonal illnesses.

Ingredients: Organic Multi-Flower Honey, Acerola Cherry Juice, Fennel Oil, Thyme Oil.

💡 How to Use

  • Dosage: Take 1 teaspoon (approx. 10–15 ml) mixed in a small cup of warm water.
  • Frequency: Use 3 times daily or as needed for throat and chest comfort.
  • Suitable For: Adults and children from 1 year old.

For best results, take regularly at the first sign of throat irritation or cold symptoms.

⚠️ Important Notes

  • Not suitable for children under 1 year, pregnant, or breastfeeding women.
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
  • This is a natural product — color, taste, and texture may vary slightly.

🌼 Nutrimexx Honey offers a clean, natural path to comfort — no synthetic additives, just pure botanical synergy.

Soothe irritation, clear congestion, and strengthen your immunity the gentle way, with every golden spoonful.
